name: Court St Water Main Upgrade
description: Replacing 1960s cast-iron water main along Court St corridor. Serves 3 redevelopment parcels.

name: Madison Ave Resurfacing
description: Full-depth road resurfacing and ADA ramp upgrades. Enables development access for MGM-V003.

name: Maxwell Blvd Bridge Repair
description: Load-rated bridge deck replacement. Critical for west corridor freight access.

name: Mobile Rd Sidewalk Extension
description: 1.2-mile sidewalk gap closure connecting residential areas to transit corridor.

name: Ann St Sewer Separation
description: Combined sewer overflow separation project. Required before residential development can proceed.

name: Lincoln Heights Fiber Expansion
description: Municipal fiber to underserved Lincoln Heights. Pairs with MGM-V001 park/housing proposal.

name: Riverdale Stormwater Basin
description: Regional detention basin to manage flooding along Riverdale corridor. Enables wetlands park.

name: West End Utility Upgrade
description: Combined electric, gas, and water upgrade for West End corridor. Paired with MGM-V006 development.

name: Highland Ave Road Grant
description: CDBG-funded road improvement project completed Q2 2024. Sidewalk phase pending.

name: Eastern Blvd Transit Stop
description: ADA-compliant transit shelter and bus pad installed. Ridership +22% since completion.

name: Bell St Fiber + Water (2023)
description: Fiber and water main upgraded 2023. Enables mixed-use redevelopment of Bell St warehouse row.

name: S Perry St Sewer Replacement
description: Aging clay sewer replaced with PVC in 2022. Parcel MGM-V008 now permit-ready.
